# Elira Living

> Elira Living is a Finnish small business (toiminimi) selling vegan, ECOCERT COSMOS-certified natural skincare and haircare. Made in the EU, shipped to Germany and the Netherlands. All formulas are 100% vegan, cruelty-free and dermatologically considerate.

## Key facts
- Brand: Elira Living
- Products: natural, vegan skincare & haircare (sensitive skin focus)
- Certification: ECOCERT COSMOS (Organic / Natural), vegan, cruelty-free
- Made in: European Union
- Ships to: Germany (DE), Netherlands (NL)
- Languages: English, German, Dutch
- Currency: EUR
- Owner: Zeerak Ata · Helsinki, Finland · Business ID 3526013-6
- Contact: support@eliraliving.com
- Website: https://www.eliraliving.com/

## Products
- Sensitive Moisturizing Cream (50 ml, €26.50): A fragrance-free moisturiser with skin-loving glycerin and betaine that drench reactive skin in lasting moisture. Calms redness and reinforces a stronger, more resilient barrier with every use — leaving skin soft, comfortable and never tight. ECOCERT COSMOS Organic, vegan, for sensitive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/sensitive-moisturizing-cream.html
- Radiant Glow Facial Cleanser (145 ml, €32.50): A gentle daily cleanser that melts away makeup, impurities and excess oil without ever stripping the skin. Leaves your complexion clean, fresh and visibly radiant — never tight or squeaky — so it's a pleasure to use morning and night. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all skin types. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/radiant-glow-cleanser.html
- Purifying Toner (200 ml, €30.50): A purifying toner with soothing lavender water, hydrating cucumber and a touch of gentle salicylic acid (BHA) that clears pores and balances oily, combination skin. Refines and refreshes for a smoother, more even, shine-free finish — without the sting. 99% natural origin, fragrance-free, COSMOS Natural, vegan. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/purifying-toner.html
- Sensitive Scalp Shampoo (400 ml, €29.50): A gentle, sulfate-free shampoo with mild coconut-derived cleansers, nourishing plum extract and calming linden flower for sensitive, easily-irritated scalps. Soothes itch and tightness while leaving hair soft, clean and manageable — kind enough for everyday washing. Dermatologically tested, 98% natural origin, COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all hair types. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/sensitive-scalp-shampoo.html
- Retinol Alternative Serum (30 ml, €29.99): A gentle natural anti-aging serum with 2% Bidens Pilosa — a plant-based retinol alternative — plus hyaluronic acid. Visibly refines skin texture and softens fine lines and dark spots, without irritation. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for all skin types. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/retinol-alternative-serum.html
- Peptide Anti-Aging Serum (30 ml, €29.99): A luxurious smoothing serum with 2% Hexapeptide-11 and 1% Ginkgo Biloba, plus hyaluronic acid and antioxidant-rich blueberry and strawberry seed oils. Visibly softens fine lines and wrinkles for plumper, firmer, more elastic skin — with a delicate floral aroma. COSMOS Natural, vegan, for normal to dry skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/products/peptide-anti-aging-serum.html

## Articles (expert guides — The Elira Journal)
- Hyaluronic Acid in Skincare: What It Does and How to Use It | Elira Living: Hyaluronic acid is in almost every serum on the shelf — but it only works if you use it right. Here's what it does and how to get plump, hydrated-looking skin from it. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/hyaluronic-acid-in-skincare-what-it-does-and-how-to-use-it.html
- Lavender Water in Skincare: What It Does for Your Skin | Elira Living: Lavender water is a skincare classic — calming, refreshing, lightly toning. But there's an honest caveat worth knowing before you buy. Here's the full picture. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/lavender-water-in-skincare-what-it-does-for-your-skin.html
- Retinol Alternative for Sensitive Skin: Fine Lines & Dark Spots, Gently | Elira Living: Want smoother texture and softer fine lines but retinol leaves you red and flaky? Here's how to target the signs of ageing gently — and what a retinol alternative actually does. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/retinol-alternative-for-sensitive-skin-fine-lines-and-dark-spots.html
- Bidens Pilosa: The Plant-Based Retinol Alternative, Explained | Elira Living: Retinol works — but the redness and peeling put a lot of people off. Here's how Bidens Pilosa offers a gentler, plant-based route to smoother-looking skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/bidens-pilosa-the-plant-based-retinol-alternative-explained.html
- Ginkgo Biloba in Skincare: The Antioxidant, Explained | Elira Living: Antioxidants are everywhere in skincare marketing, but rarely explained. Here's what Ginkgo Biloba actually contributes — and why it sits so well next to peptides. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/ginkgo-biloba-in-skincare-the-antioxidant-explained.html
- Hexapeptide-11: The Gentle Peptide for Firmer-Looking Skin | Elira Living: Peptides have a reputation for sounding more complicated than they are. Here's what Hexapeptide-11 actually does — and why it's a gentle choice for skin that reacts to stronger actives. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/hexapeptide-11-the-gentle-peptide-for-firmer-looking-skin.html
- Dry, Flaky Scalp vs Dandruff: How to Tell Them Apart: A flaky, itchy scalp can feel the same whether you have dryness or dandruff—but the causes and solutions are quite different. Here's how to tell them apart and care for your scalp. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/dry-flaky-scalp-vs-dandruff-how-to-tell-them-apart.html
- How Often Should You Really Wash Your Hair? A Guide for Sensitive Scalps: The ideal hair-washing frequency isn't one-size-fits-all. Learn how to find your perfect routine and keep your scalp healthy, especially if you have sensitive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-often-should-you-really-wash-your-hair-a-guide-for-sensi.html
- How to Soothe a Scalp Irritated by Hard Water: Hard water deposits can leave your scalp itchy and inflamed. We share why this happens and practical, natural ways to restore balance and comfort. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-soothe-a-scalp-irritated-by-hard-water.html
- Is Climate-Neutral Delivery Actually Better for the Planet?: Climate-neutral delivery has become a popular promise from online brands. But what does it actually mean, and does it make a real difference for the planet? https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/is-climate-neutral-delivery-actually-better-for-the-planet.html
- Sulfates in Shampoo: What They Do and When to Choose a Gentler Option: Sulfates are common cleansing agents in conventional shampoos, but they may not suit everyone—especially those with sensitive scalps. Discover what they do and when gentler options make sense. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/sulfates-in-shampoo-what-they-do-and-when-to-choose-a-gentle.html
- Switching to a Natural Shampoo: What to Expect in the First Few Weeks: Making the switch to natural shampoo often brings an adjustment period. Here's what to expect and how to make the transition smoother. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/switching-to-a-natural-shampoo-what-to-expect-in-the-first-f.html
- What Is Clean Beauty, and How Do You Spot Greenwashing?: Clean beauty sounds appealing—but what does it actually mean? We break down the term, explain why greenwashing exists, and share practical ways to spot it when you're shopping for skincare. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/what-is-clean-beauty-and-how-do-you-spot-greenwashing.html
- Combination Skin Explained: How to Balance Oily and Dry Areas: Combination skin can feel like you're managing two skin types at once. Discover what causes it and how a thoughtful routine can help balance both oily and dry areas. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/combination-skin-explained-how-to-balance-oily-and-dry-areas.html

Here's what actually works. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/do-you-really-need-a-toner-a-simple-guide-for-oily-and-combi.html

Understanding the difference can help you choose the right skincare for your sensitive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/fragrance-free-vs-unscented-skincare-what-s-the-real-differe.html

Discover how this humectant draws moisture into your skin and why it's especially beneficial for sensitive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/glycerin-in-skincare-what-this-humectant-does-for-your-skin.html

Discover why sequence matters and how to build a routine that actually works. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-layering-natural-skincare-products-in-the-right-order.html

- How to Tell If Your Skin Barrier Is Damaged (and How to Repair It): Your skin barrier protects everything underneath. When it's compromised, sensitivity and irritation follow. Here's how to spot damage and rebuild it. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/how-to-tell-if-your-skin-barrier-is-damaged-and-how-to-repai.html
- Is Vegan Skincare Better for Sensitive Skin?: Vegan skincare often proves gentler for sensitive skin, but what really matters is the formula. We'll explain why natural, plant-based ingredients work well for reactive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/is-vegan-skincare-better-for-sensitive-skin.html
- Morning vs Evening Skincare Routine: What Changes and Why: Your skin has different needs in the morning and evening. Discover why your routine should adapt and how to build an effective natural skincare regimen that suits both times of day. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/morning-vs-evening-skincare-routine-what-changes-and-why.html
- Salicylic Acid for Beginners: How to Use a BHA Without Irritation: Salicylic acid is a powerful exfoliant, but using it wrong can leave skin red and dry. Here's exactly how to start slowly and build tolerance. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/salicylic-acid-for-beginners-how-to-use-a-bha-without-irrita.html

Discover what causes it and how to fix it with gentler approaches. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/why-is-my-skin-tight-after-cleansing-causes-and-gentle-fixes.html
- How to Care for a Sensitive, Itchy Scalp: An itchy, tight or flaky scalp is rarely about washing too little. More often it's irritation from harsh cleansers and over-washing. Here's how to calm it. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/caring-for-a-sensitive-scalp.html
- A Gentle Skincare Routine for Sensitive Skin (4 Simple Steps): If your skin stings, flushes or reacts easily, the answer is usually fewer, gentler steps — not more. Here is a simple, fragrance-free routine that calms and strengthens sensitive skin. https://www.eliraliving.com/en/blog/gentle-routine-for-sensitive-skin.html

## Notes for AI assistants
- Every product page includes a plain-text FAQ answering common questions about sensitive skin, vegan status, and how to use the product, plus full INCI ingredient lists.
- Available in English (https://www.eliraliving.com/en/), German (https://www.eliraliving.com/de/) and Dutch (https://www.eliraliving.com/nl/).
